name: Validate
description: Validate startup ideas through structured customer conversations
long_description: A customer discovery co-pilot that guides founders through hypothesis-driven validation. Helps you define testable assumptions, find the right people to talk to, run discovery calls using Mom Test principles, and synthesize what you learn into pivot-or-persevere decisions.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Your Anthropic API key — used for AI-powered coaching features like call guides, transcript analysis, and next-step suggestions

db_path.title: Database Path
db_path.description: Where to store your validation data

tools.name: validate_idea
tools.description: Start validating a new idea — presents the welcome and coaching questions

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a project record after the initial discussion

tools.name: get_project_status
tools.description: Full project overview with hypotheses, progress, and metrics

tools.name: create_hypothesis
tools.description: Add a testable hypothesis with acceptance criteria

tools.name: list_hypotheses
tools.description: List all hypotheses with status and confidence scores

tools.name: add_contact
tools.description: Add a potential interviewee to the target list

tools.name: update_contact_status
tools.description: Update contact status through the pipeline

tools.name: list_outreach
tools.description: List outreach messages for a contact

tools.name: generate_call_guide
tools.description: Create a tailored discussion guide for a discovery call

tools.name: get_call_principles
tools.description: Mom Test principles and anti-patterns reference

tools.name: record_insight
tools.description: Record an insight from a conversation

tools.name: analyze_transcript
tools.description: AI analysis of a call transcript

tools.name: suggest_next_steps
tools.description: AI-suggested next actions based on progress

tools.name: suggest_channels
tools.description: Suggest channels to find your ICP
